allow: Read(//d/park/snowflack/NR>1 && $8!="" {sum+=$8; if\(min==""||$8<min\)min=$8; if\($8>max\)max=$8; cnt++} END{printf "매매가\(공급평당\): min=%.1f, max=%.1f, avg=%.1f, count=%d/n",min,max,sum/**)
Read(//d/park/snowflack/NR>1 && $9!="" {sum+=$9; if\(min==""||$9<min\)min=$9; if\($9>max\)max=$9; cnt++} END{printf "전세가\(공급평당\): min=%.1f, max=%.1f, avg=%.1f, count=%d/n",min,max,sum/**)
Read(//d/park/snowflack/NR>1 && $7!="" {sum+=$7; if\(min==""||$7+0<min+0\)min=$7; if\($7+0>max+0\)max=$7; cnt++} END{printf "5세미만 인구: min=%d, max=%d, avg=%.1f/n",min,max,sum/**)
Read(//d/park/snowflack/NR>1 && $8!="" {sum+=$8; if\(min==""||$8+0<min+0\)min=$8; if\($8+0>max+0\)max=$8; cnt++} END{printf "20~40세 여성: min=%d, max=%d, avg=%.1f/n",min,max,sum/**)
